svg.text: void* memset( void* ptr, int value, size_t count )
Example 2 — fill with 0xFF (all bits set) memset(buf, 0xFF, 6)
The trap — value is truncated to 1 byte, then replicated
int arr[2]; memset(arr, 1, sizeof(arr)) — each byte = 0x01, NOT each int = 1
These replicate cleanly across multi-byte integers. Any other byte value gives unexpected int/float results.
